title: BYE BYE AIMIE (Part 1)
overview: Bolt is suspected of killing several biotech scientists.

title: BYE BYE AIMIE (Part 2)
overview: The truth behind the experiments comes out, and the culprit is brought to justice. Or so it seems...

title: World`s Greatest Mercenary
overview: A small village hires Bolt Crank to protect them from an expansionist company.

title: Body Guard
overview: Bolt is hired to protect a girl. But he's only got an hour until the next transport.

title: Ambrosian Days Part 1
overview: Bolt arrives in a country where the king will be determined by whosoever can wield a certain sword.

title: Ambrosian Days Part 2
overview: With the sword stolen and a demon on a rampage, Bolt's got his work cut out for him.

title: Ambrosian Days Part 3
overview: Coco's past comes back to haunt her. Meanwhile, the Ambrosian Sword has been found.

title: Ambrosian Days Part 4
overview: Even with the sword recovered, Du Marc's plans for Ambrosia come to a head.

title: Mega Mix Part 1
overview: Bolt has a job to escort a runaway girl back to her father. But this might be more than just a job for Bolt.

title: Mega Mix Part 2
overview: Mira's memories have mostly returned, but the whole story has yet to be revealed.

title: The Farcical Dream Part 1
overview: Someone is trying to kill two political leaders, but Bolt thinks there's more to it than assassination.

title: The Farcical Dream Part 2
overview: Hard confronts Raffin, but learns the unfortunate truth behind the whole affair.
